name: { Sai Sahithi Kontam }
headline: Backend Software Engineer | AI/ML Engineer | Building Scalable APIs, Intelligent Systems & AI Applications

description: Engineered scalable backend microservices for Ziply Fiber's Quote-to-Order lifecycle, including Quote, Order, Payment, and Order Tracking services.
Designed and developed secure REST APIs using Spring Boot to support enterprise telecom order management workflows.
Built event-driven workflows using Apache Kafka for asynchronous communication between microservices, improving scalability, reliability, and fault tolerance.
Integrated Salesforce with Microsoft Dynamics to enable seamless bidirectional synchronization of customer and order data.
Developed secure payment and order processing services, ensuring reliable transaction handling and business continuity.
Optimized backend API performance by reducing payload sizes, eliminating redundant service calls, and improving response times.
Implemented structured logging, exception handling, monitoring, and secure coding practices to improve production observability and maintainability.
Developed an IoT-based real-time water quality monitoring system in collaboration with Arizona State University (ASU) – EPICS.
Monitored pH, salinity, and turbidity using ESP32 sensors with cloud integration via Firebase.
Implemented machine learning models to predict water quality trends for the next 7 days using historical sensor data.
Designed as a commercial product planned for launch on Amazon and Flipkart at an affordable price point.
Developed a real-time prosthetic arm control system using EMG signal acquisition and ML-based gesture recognition
Implemented gesture-based limb movement using Raspberry Pi and Python
Recognized as a patent project for innovation in assistive healthcare technology
Built ML models with 90% accuracy using Python and Scikit-learn; documented data preprocessing and results for governance and audit purposes.
Implemented supervised and unsupervised ML models ensuring reproducibility and compliance; optimized ML algorithms for improved performance on real datasets.

education.degree: Bachelor of Computer Science - AIML Specialization
education.institution: Shri Vishnu Engineering College for Women
description: Graduating with a 9.1 CGPA, I mastered core computer science concepts and specialized in AI/ML, completing projects in NLP, computer vision, and deep learning.
Led a team to develop an IoT-based water quality monitoring system, showcasing my ability to apply AI/ML in real-world scenarios and manage end-to-end project development.
secured 953 marks out of 1000 with a percentage of 95.3% in the intermediate examination conducted by the Board of Intermediate Education, Andhra Pradesh.
secured 599 marks out of 600 with a percentage of 99.8% in the secondary school certificate examination conducted by the Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh.

projects.title: AcaRAG-Pro – AI Chatbot for Academic Support
projects.description: Engineered a production-grade Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) chatbot using FastAPI, GROQ LLM, and ChromaDB to answer questions from institutional PDFs. Implemented multi-level Cache-Augmented Generation (CAG), reducing repeated query latency from 3–4 seconds to 0.5 seconds while improving response efficiency and user experience.

projects.title: Transac-NOVA – AI Transaction Intelligence System
projects.description: Designed a high-throughput AI transaction intelligence platform using FastAPI microservices for large-scale financial transaction ingestion and analytics. Integrated anomaly detection models with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to detect fraudulent activities and generate intelligent financial insights in real time.

projects.title: AI Code Reviewer
projects.description: Built an AI-powered code review platform that analyzes Git repositories and ZIP projects for bugs, code quality, and security issues. Integrated GPT with LangChain to provide contextual recommendations and best-practice improvements using a FastAPI backend and React frontend.

projects.title: AI Meeting Summarizer
projects.description: Developed an AI meeting assistant that converts meeting recordings into transcripts using OpenAI Whisper and generates concise summaries with GPT. Automatically extracts key discussion points, action items, and decisions through a FastAPI backend and Streamlit interface.

projects.title: Food Delivery Web Platform
projects.description: Developed a scalable MERN-based food ordering platform featuring secure Stripe payment integration, RESTful APIs for authentication and order management, and optimized backend services for high-performance database operations.

projects.title: Prescripto – Doctor Appointment Platform
projects.description: Built a full-stack healthcare platform with Patient, Doctor, and Admin dashboards using the MERN stack. Implemented JWT authentication, secure appointment scheduling, and integrated Stripe and Razorpay payment gateways.

projects.title: Aqua Guard – IoT Water Quality Monitoring
projects.description: Built an IoT-based real-time water quality monitoring system using ESP32 sensors and Firebase cloud services. Implemented machine learning models to predict water quality trends from historical sensor data for aquaculture applications.

projects.title: Prosthetic Arm Control Using EMG Signals
projects.description: Developed a real-time prosthetic arm control system using EMG signal acquisition and machine learning-based gesture recognition. Implemented Raspberry Pi-powered control pipelines for assistive healthcare applications and contributed to a patent-worthy innovation.
